## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] **`prek run --all-files`** passes (or hooks installed with `prek install`); Rust `clippy` / tests as needed for your change
- [ ] Python client tests (`pytest` under `client/python/`, with a venv) pass locally if you changed `client/python/`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or public API changed
